I'm an MSc Marketing & Strategy student at Warwick Business School, graduating September 2026. My background spans agency, brand, and research roles across the UK and India, with hands-on experience in sponsorship acquisition, commercial negotiation, and multi-stakeholder campaign delivery.

My academic work has deepened my interest in the strategic and commercial architecture of sport, from analysing the Formula 1 Concorde Agreement's revenue frameworks to developing integrated brand campaigns. I'm drawn to roles where marketing, commercial planning, and business development intersect.

Outside of work, I'm a certified Aerial Dancer, a guitar player, and an avid follower of Formula 1, not just for the racing, but for the extraordinary commercial machine behind it.

04

Projects

Mock Campaign Portfolio · Sponsorship & Integrated Marketing

Nykaa × Formula 1 — Race Day Glam

Integrated Campaign Concept · Beauty × Motorsport

A full-scale mock campaign exploring what a Nykaa × Formula 1 brand partnership could look like in market. Developed end-to-end from commercial rationale and audience mapping through to Meta ad creative strategy, GA4 measurement framework, content calendar, and a detailed financial model. The campaign targets the intersection of F1's growing female fanbase and Nykaa's beauty-forward Gen Z audience, building a culturally resonant co-brand around race weekends.

Sponsorship Strategy Integrated Campaign Paid Social (Meta) GA4 & Analytics Financial Modelling Content Strategy
"Beauty meets the grid — where two of India's most culturally charged brands collide." View Campaign ↗
Project Management IB9RG0 · Warwick Business School

F1 Fan Intelligence & Campaign Optimisation Programme

Formula One World Championship Limited

A hypothetical new project pitched to F1, proposing a data-driven Fan Intelligence system to unify audience insights and optimise campaign performance across F1's dual audiences: hardcore technical fans and expanding mainstream viewers. Evaluated F1's PM maturity and culture, then applied risk management and integrated planning frameworks to design and propose the programme from scratch.

Risk Management Integrated Planning Stakeholder Strategy PM Maturity Analysis
"F1 ties together four distinct entities: a sport, an entertainment venue, a technological achievement, and an international storytelling brand." View Report ↗
Negotiation IB9RG0 · Warwick Business School

2021 Formula 1 Concorde Agreement

Commercial & Legal Frameworks Analysis

In-depth case study examining the commercial architecture of the 2021 Concorde Agreement, analysing revenue distribution structures, stakeholder negotiation dynamics, and the power balance between the FIA, Formula One Group, and the ten constructors.

Commercial Frameworks Negotiation Dynamics Revenue Distribution
View Report ↗
Integrated Campaign IB845B · Marketing Through Social Media

'Feel First' — The INKEY List

Brand Campaign · Group Project

Developed and produced a full integrated marketing campaign for The INKEY List, including a 12-week social media content calendar, campaign video production (iMovie), strategy slide decks, and a live presentation. Delivered end-to-end from brief to execution.

Content Strategy Video Production Campaign Delivery
View Campaign ↗
Social Media Analysis IB845B · Marketing Through Social Media

Rolex vs TAG Heuer — Digital Strategy Comparison

Luxury Watch Brands · Individual Assignment

A comparative analysis of how two prestige watchmakers employ opposing social media philosophies — Rolex's strategy of resonance over reach vs. TAG Heuer's strategy of velocity and volume — evaluated through the IDEACT framework, engagement benchmarking data, and the commercial logic behind each approach. Includes analysis of TAG Heuer's $1bn F1 title sponsorship as a content engine strategy.

IDEACT Framework Luxury Social Strategy Engagement Analysis F1 Sponsorship
View Report ↗
Simulation Project Management Module · Warwick

Live Project Management Simulation

7-Hour Real-Time Team Simulation

Participated in a full-day live simulation managing a complex project from brief to completion, making real-time stakeholder decisions, building a critical path analysis and Gantt chart in pre-simulation prep, and balancing competing priorities under time pressure across multiple project stages.

Critical Path Analysis Gantt Chart Stakeholder Decisions
